Next
**Qartaj** is a Tunisian B2B fair-trade enterprise connecting global buyers with **curated, export-ready Tunisian handicrafts.**
We work closely with skilled artisans to preserve ancestral know-how, support endangered crafts, and transform traditional techniques into **contemporary products aligned with international market needs.**
Through our tailored sourcing and export services, Qartaj enables businesses to work directly and reliably with the best Tunisian artisans.
[Read more About us](https://qartaj.com/about-qartaj "Read more About us")
* * *

# Why choose to have an impact with us?
![Authentic craftsmanship by Qartaj – handmade Tunisian home décor](https://qartaj.com/media/wysiwyg/pottery_2557996_1_1_.png)![Authentic craftsmanship by Qartaj – handmade Tunisian home décor](https://qartaj.com/media/wysiwyg/pottery_2557996_1_1_.png)
#### Authentic Craftsmanship
Our products are handmade by skilled Tunisian artisans, preserving traditional craftsmanship and supporting local communities.
![Eco-friendly handmade olive wood cutting board, sustainable craftsmanship](https://qartaj.com/media/wysiwyg/handshake_15329247_1.png)![Eco-friendly handmade olive wood cutting board, sustainable craftsmanship](https://qartaj.com/media/wysiwyg/handshake_15329247_1.png)
#### Eco-Friendly & Sustainable
We prioritize eco-friendly materials, ensuring that our products are both beautiful and sustainable, contributing to a greener planet.
![Handmade Tunisian olive wood products supporting local communities](https://qartaj.com/media/wysiwyg/compassion_16856818_1.png)![Handmade Tunisian olive wood products supporting local communities](https://qartaj.com/media/wysiwyg/compassion_16856818_1.png)
####  Supporting Local Communities
Every purchase empowers Tunisian artisans, fostering economic development and supporting fair trade principles.
![Handmade Tunisian products with worldwide shipping](https://qartaj.com/media/wysiwyg/global-shipping_4003669_1.png)![Handmade Tunisian products with worldwide shipping](https://qartaj.com/media/wysiwyg/global-shipping_4003669_1.png)
####  Worldwide Shipping
We offer international shipping, with delivery rates calculated at checkout for your convenience.
